## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short`
- [ ] `python -m mkdocs build --strict`
- [ ] `npm --prefix frontend run build` (if frontend changed)
- [ ] `docker compose config` / Docker validation (if deployment changed)
